proof:
constructor
  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · intro x h
    have h1 : 30 * x ≡ 30 * 39 [MOD 47] := h.trans (by norm_num [Nat.ModEq])
    have h2 : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime (by norm_num) h1
    calc
      39 = 39 % 47 := (Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by norm_num)).symm
      _ = x % 47 := h2.symm
      _ ≤ x := Nat.mod_le x 47
